new_terms.suggested_translation: EMIB (嵌入式多芯片互连桥接)
new_terms.context: Sapphire Rapids debuted Intel’s EMIB advanced packaging technology to carry the mesh architecture across dies.
several clustering modes were offered that split the mesh into quadrants for Sub-NUMA Clustering (SNC)
Two pairs of mirrored 15-core dies were stitched together with a Modular Die Fabric
Intel went for heterogeneous disaggregation by partitioning the I/O away from the core and memory.
The compute dies debut Intel’s Foveros Direct hybrid bonding technology
bringing 28 cores in the XCC die.
Xeon 6 Compute Die Mosaic. Clockwise from Top Left: UCC 44c, HCC 50c, HDCC 152c, LCC 20c.
The mesh grid is 6 columns by 9 rows in size, with top and bottom rows more IO and MCDRAM.
